_schema.description: Per-conference-year metadata and notes. Keys are 'CONFID_YEAR'. Serves as the provenance log for all data decisions.

fields.paper_source_url: URL of paper list if not from DBLP SPARQL
fields.accept_rate_source: Where acceptance rate data came from
fields.skip: true — if set, step4 will exclude this conference-year from stats (e.g. joint conference papers already counted under another conference)
fields.status: ok | noise | gap | virtual | partial | uninvestigated — for anomaly tracking
fields.note: Free-text note for provenance and context

_comment_noise: === NOISE: Data that shouldn't exist or is from wrong conference ===

BIBM_2013.note: Spike: 319 vs max 131. Investigated 2026-03-12: DBLP structural change. 2010-2012 had separate workshop proceedings volume (bibmw20xx, 184-216 papers); from 2013 onward workshops merged into main proceedings. Not a data error — IEEE BIBM includes workshops in same proceedings since 2013.

CADE_2010.note: CADE alternates with IJCAR; 2010 was an IJCAR year. These 43 papers may be from IJCAR proceedings cross-filed in the CADE DBLP stream.

ICLR_2011.note: ICLR was founded in 2013. These 2 papers are DBLP indexing noise.

WICSA_2010.note: WICSA did not hold a standalone 2010 conference (2009 was joint WICSA/ECSA in Cambridge). These 13 papers may be DBLP indexing artifacts.

HIPEAC_2018.note: HiPEAC API descriptions empty for 2018. Only 4 papers from search_api fallback — effectively a gap. No alternative data source found.

_comment_cross_filed: === CROSS-FILED: Papers published under another conference in DBLP ===

ECAI_2018.note: ECAI 2018 was joint IJCAI-ECAI. Papers cross-filed under conf/ijcai/ in DBLP. 870 papers copied from IJCAI data.

ECAI_2022.note: ECAI 2022 was joint IJCAI-ECAI. Papers cross-filed under conf/ijcai/ in DBLP. 863 papers copied from IJCAI data.

IJCNLP_2015.note: IJCNLP 2015 co-located as ACL-IJCNLP 2015. Papers filed under conf/acl/ in DBLP. 343 papers copied from ACL 2015 data.

_comment_search_api_manual: === MANUAL SEARCH API: Gaps manually filled via DBLP Search API + HTML ===

CICAI_2021.note: SPARQL returns 0 (DBLP key issue). 103 papers recovered via Search API. CAAI International Conference 1st edition.

CICAI_2022.note: SPARQL returns 0 (DBLP key issue). 167 papers recovered via Search API. CAAI International Conference 2nd edition.

CICAI_2023.note: SPARQL returns 0 (papers indexed under conf/cicba/ not conf/cicai/). 100 papers recovered via Search API.

DRM_2010.note: DRM venue name contains 'Workshop' — caught by _EXCLUDED_VENUE_RE filter. 12 papers recovered via Search API bypass.

DRM_2011.note: DRM venue name contains 'Workshop' — caught by filter. 7 papers recovered via HTML fallback (Search API returned 500).

FAST_2021.note: Virtual event due to COVID-19. SPARQL returned 0 (gap), 28 papers recovered via Search API + HTML fallback. DBLP venue page has no h2 heading for 2021.

HOTSTORAGE_2020.note: Virtual event due to COVID-19. SPARQL returned 0 (gap), 36 papers recovered via Search API. DBLP venue page has no h2 heading for 2020.

_comment_anomaly_spike: === ANOMALY SPIKE: Detected by step4, not yet fully investigated ===

BIBM_2013.note: Spike: 319 vs max 131. Investigated 2026-03-12: real growth. Conference permanently expanded ~2013, sustained trend to 1158 (2024).

COLING_2024.note: Spike: 1553 vs max 632. Investigated 2026-03-12: joint COLING/LREC 2024 (venue h2 confirms). One-time merger, COLING 2025 back to 848.

CONLL_2012.note: Spike: 155 vs max 51. EMNLP-CoNLL 2012 joint conference. 100% paper overlap (155/155) with EMNLP_2012 — skip to avoid double-counting. Papers counted under EMNLP.

FACCT_2022.note: Spike: 181 vs max 41. Investigated 2026-03-12: real growth. Young conference (started 2018), sustained growth to 206 (2025).

ICDCS_2017.note: Spike: 323 vs max 110. Investigated 2026-03-12: not workshop contamination. Starting 2017, DBLP indexes multiple ICDCS tracks (Industry, Applications, Vision, Short Papers, Demos, Posters) alongside main research track (~80-110 papers). Structural change in DBLP indexing.

ICIC_2024.note: Spike: 864 vs max 337. Investigated 2026-03-12: real growth. Springer LNCS conference with accelerating expansion: 208→337→864→1206.

ICPADS_2023.note: Spike: 405 vs max 145. Investigated 2026-03-12: genuinely large proceedings (2888 pages). Includes 55 short papers (<=4 pages) + 350 regular papers. China-hosted years (2023, 2025) have larger acceptance. 2024 (Belgrade, 94 papers) was smaller.

IJCNLP_2019.note: Spike: 732 vs max 343. EMNLP-IJCNLP 2019 joint conference. 100% paper overlap (732/732) with EMNLP_2019 — skip to avoid double-counting. Papers counted under EMNLP.

IJCNLP_2020.note: AACL-IJCNLP 2020: 809 papers, 710 (88%) overlapping with ACL_2020. 99 unique AACL papers retained after dedup. Overlapping papers removed from raw data.

IJCNLP_2021.note: ACL-IJCNLP 2021 joint conference. 100% paper overlap (458/458) with ACL_2021 — skip to avoid double-counting. Papers counted under ACL.

PRCV_2023.note: Spike: 522 vs max 233. Investigated 2026-03-12: real growth. Chinese CV conference (Springer LNCS), sustained trend: 158→201→233→522→579→691.

UIC_2012.note: Co-located UIC/ATC 2012. Filtered 2026-03-12: removed ATC + 9 workshops via DBLP h2 sections. 154 → 55 UIC-only first-author papers.

UIC_2013.note: Co-located UIC/ATC 2013. Filtered 2026-03-12: removed ATC + workshops via DBLP h2 sections. 98 → 43 UIC-only first-author papers.

UIC_2014.note: Co-located UIC/ATC/ScalCom 2014. DBLP page has no section headers — cannot separate UIC from co-located conferences. 133 papers includes all co-located.

UIC_2015.note: Co-located UIC/ATC/ScalCom 2015. DBLP page has no section headers — cannot separate. 317 papers includes all co-located.

UIC_2016.note: Co-located UIC/ATC/ScalCom/CBDCom/IoP/SmartWorld 2016. DBLP page has no section headers — cannot separate. 166 papers includes all co-located.

UIC_2017.note: Co-located SmartWorld/ScalCom/UIC/ATC/CBDCom/IoP/SCI 2017. DBLP page has no section headers — cannot separate. 282 papers includes all co-located.

UIC_2018.note: Co-located SmartWorld/UIC/ATC/ScalCom/CBDCom/IoP/SCI 2018. Filtered 2026-03-12: removed 6 co-located conferences + 5 workshops within UIC section via DBLP h2+h3 sections. 320 → 127 UIC-only first-author papers (4 tracks + WiP).

UIC_2019.note: Co-located SmartWorld/ScalCom/UIC/ATC/CBDCom/IoP/SCI 2019. DBLP page has no section headers — cannot separate. 300 papers includes all co-located.

UIC_2021.note: Co-located SmartWorld/ScalCom/UIC/ATC/IoP/SCI 2021. DBLP page has no section headers — cannot separate. 90 papers includes all co-located.

UIC_2022.note: Co-located UIC/SmartWorld/ScalCom/DigitalTwin/PriComp/Meta 2022. DBLP page has no section headers — cannot separate. 339 papers includes all co-located.

USENIXSECURITY_2021.note: Spike: 247 vs max 113. Investigated 2026-03-12: real growth. Conference expanded to multiple submission cycles ~2020. Sustained growth to 487 (2025).

USENIXSECURITY_2022.note: Spike: 256 vs max 113. Investigated 2026-03-12: real growth. Same multi-cycle expansion as 2021. Sustained through 2025.

_comment_anomaly_drop: === ANOMALY DROP: Detected by step4, investigated or partially known ===

CEC_2023.note: Sharp drop: 124 vs avg 336. Investigated 2026-03-12: real small edition. DBLP confirms 125 papers. CEC declining since 2020 (WCCI only in even years). Avg inflated by historically larger editions.

CONLL_2014.note: Sharp drop: 33 vs avg 83. Investigated 2026-03-12: real small edition. Avg inflated by CoNLL 2012 shared task (155 papers). Normal range is 28-51 papers.

HPCC_2017.note: Sharp drop: 88 papers vs recent avg 241. Investigated 2026-03-12: proceedings keys match — not a gap, likely smaller edition.

HPDC_2011.note: Sharp drop: 34 vs avg 106. Investigated 2026-03-12: HPDC 2010 is the outlier (106 papers includes co-located workshop papers ECMLS/LSAP/VTDC/MapReduce). HPDC normally has 23-52 papers; 34 is expected.

HPDC_2010.note: Originally 106 papers — included 50 co-located workshop papers (ECMLS 15, LSAP 11, VTDC 14, MapReduce 10). Workshop papers removed 2026-03-12, leaving 56 main conference papers (best papers + resources/clouds + data centers/virtualization + applications/provenance + posters).

ICA3PP_2016.note: Sharp drop: 52 papers vs recent avg 140. Investigated 2026-03-12: proceedings keys match — not a gap.

ICA3PP_2022.note: Sharp drop: 43 papers vs recent avg 120. Investigated 2026-03-12: proceedings keys match — not a gap.

IEEEVIS_2015.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 104 papers from TVCG vol.22 issue 1 added to 31 conf papers → 135 total. VIS Year Y → TVCG Year(Y+1) Issue 1.

IEEEVIS_2016.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 104 papers from TVCG vol.23 issue 1 added → 245 total.

IEEEVIS_2017.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 101 papers from TVCG vol.24 issue 1 added → 236 total.

IEEEVIS_2018.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 122 papers from TVCG vol.25 issue 1 added → 287 total.

IEEEVIS_2019.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 120 papers from TVCG vol.26 issue 1 added → 322 total.

IEEEVIS_2020.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 154 papers from TVCG vol.27 issue 2 added → 350 total. Exception: VIS 2020 in issue 2 (COVID delay).

IEEEVIS_2021.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 112 papers from TVCG vol.28 issue 1 added → 327 total.

IEEEVIS_2022.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 120 papers from TVCG vol.29 issue 1 added to 55 conf papers → 175 total.

IEEEVIS_2023.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 134 papers from TVCG vol.30 issue 1 added → 342 total.

IEEEVIS_2024.note: TVCG gap recovered 2026-03-12: 130 papers from TVCG vol.31 issue 1 added → 229 total.

IEEEVR_2022.note: Sharp drop: 128 vs avg 326. Investigated 2026-03-12: avg inflated by VR 2019 (506 papers — included posters/demos/doctoral consortium). Post-2019 normal is ~130 papers. 128 is expected.

IJCNLP_2023.note: Sharp drop: 132 vs avg 388. Investigated 2026-03-12: real small edition. AACL-IJCNLP 2023 was standalone regional conference (not joint with EMNLP/ACL like 2019-2021). 132 main proceedings papers is expected.

ISPA_2014.note: Sharp drop: 33 papers vs recent avg 148. Investigated 2026-03-12: proceedings keys match — not a gap.

MLSYS_2019.note: Sharp drop: 32 vs avg 116. Investigated 2026-03-12: real small edition. Only 2nd edition (then SysML 2019). Avg inflated by MLSys 2018 (116 papers from 1st SysML workshop with invited/demo papers). Normal early trajectory: 32→34→52→51.

PDCAT_2014.note: Sharp drop: 30 vs avg 86. Investigated 2026-03-12: matches DBLP's own index (31 papers). Conference had organizational issues ~2014-2015 (2015 missing entirely). Genuinely small edition.

WWW_2011.note: Sharp drop: 90 papers vs recent avg 249. Investigated 2026-03-12: due to Companion Volume split (84 main + 165 companion). Main track only is correct.

_comment_venue: === VENUE METADATA: Conferences with venue info added manually ===
